examples: Lycopene is fat soluble and must be consumed with a certain amount of fat to be absorbed by the body.
Fruits with a red hue, such as tomatoes, guava, and papaya, contain lycopene, a reddish pigment and nutrients.
It is good to consume tomatoes as they have lycopene, which is an antioxidant and hence works as a sunscreen from within.
Another antioxidant, lycopene, found in foods like canned tomatoes and red grapefruit juice, also promotes skin health.
Researchers have learned that men who devour lots of lycopene reduce their chances of contracting prostate cancer.
